title: 第一部分 基础训练 TEST 1

sections.title: 一、阅读理解 A
sections.instruction: 阅读下面语言材料，从每题所给的 A、B、C、D 四个选项中选出最佳选项。
sections.passage:
Do you like the sun? Here is a way to have the "sun" in your room every day!

You will need:
* a paper plate
* a stapler
* some yellow paint
* a black pen
* a brush
* a hole punch
* yellow paper
* string
* scissors

**Step 1:** Paint the back of the plate yellow.
**Step 2:** Put one hand on the yellow paper and draw around it. Do it for 7 times on seven pieces of paper.
**Step 3:** Cut out the 7 paper hands one by one.
**Step 4:** Staple the paper hands to the plate.
**Step 5:** Draw a happy face on the center of the plate. The sun is finished.
**Step 6:** Make a hole at the top of the plate.
**Step 7:** Put string through the hole. Hang up the sun in your room!

questions.prompt:
Which of the following are useful to make the "sun"?
① A paper plate
② A bowl
③ A pen
④ A brush
questions.translation:
以下哪些工具在制作“太阳”时是有用的？
①纸盘
②碗
③钢笔
④刷子
questions.explanation: 根据文中“You will need: a paper plate... a black pen... a brush...”可知，需要纸盘（①）、黑笔（③）和刷子（④），不需要碗（②）。因此答案为D。

questions.prompt: What color do you need to paint the back of the plate?
questions.translation: 你需要把纸盘的背面涂成什么颜色？
questions.explanation: 根据“Step 1: Paint the back of the plate yellow.”可知，需要把纸盘背面涂成黄色。因此答案为B。

questions.prompt: In which step do you need to use scissors?
questions.translation: 在哪个步骤中你需要使用剪刀？
questions.explanation: 根据“Step 3: Cut out the 7 paper hands one by one.”可知，剪下纸手掌需要用到剪刀，即步骤3。因此答案为C。

questions.prompt: Which of the following is TRUE according to the passage?
options: A. You need to paint the paper yellow.
B. You need to put string through the hole.
C. You need to make a hole on the center of the plate.
D. You need to make holes on the 7 paper hands.
questions.translation: 根据文章，下列哪项是正确的？
questions.explanation: 根据“Step 7: Put string through the hole.”可知，需要把绳子穿过孔。因此答案为B。

sections.title: 一、阅读理解 B
sections.instruction: 阅读下面语言材料，从每题所给的 A、B、C、D 四个选项中选出最佳选项。
sections.passage:
My name is Helen. My friend is Lisa. She is from Moscow. We live in a small apartment. We call it the vegetarian apartment because we like to eat vegetables!

We have lots of plants in our apartment, and they are really beautiful. I enjoy cleaning a lot. So Lisa calls me the "Dust Enemy".

We have some important rules for our home:
* **No shoes inside.** We must take off shoes when we get into our house.
* **We only have things that we can wash.** So we don't have a sofa. Lisa made this rule.
* **Ask before using each other's things.** Be kind to each other.
* **Share the housework.**
* **Keep quiet and don't listen to loud music.**
* **No alarm clocks for Sundays.** Nobody wants to get disturbed while they sleep well.

questions.translation: 莉萨来自哪里？
questions.explanation: 根据第一段“My friend is Lisa. She is from Moscow.”可知，莉萨来自莫斯科，莫斯科是俄罗斯的首都。因此答案为D。

questions.prompt: What does the underlined word "vegetarian" mean in Chinese?
questions.translation: 画线单词“vegetarian”的中文意思是什么？
questions.explanation: 根据“We call it the vegetarian apartment because we like to eat vegetables!”可知，她们因为喜欢吃蔬菜（vegetables）而称公寓为“vegetarian apartment”，可推知“vegetarian”意为“素食者/素食的”。因此答案为B。

questions.prompt: Why is Helen called the "Dust Enemy"?
options: A. Because she likes doing cleaning.
B. Because she wants to be a cleaner.
C. Because she takes a bath twice a day.
D. Because she always makes Lisa do housework.
questions.translation: 为什么海伦被称为“灰尘天敌”？
questions.explanation: 根据第二段“I enjoy cleaning a lot. So Lisa calls me the 'Dust Enemy'.”可知，因为海伦非常喜欢打扫卫生。因此答案为A。

questions.prompt: What can Helen and Lisa do in their apartment?
options: A. Walk at home without shoes.
questions.translation: 海伦和莉萨可以在她们的公寓里做什么？
questions.explanation: 根据家规“No shoes inside. We must take off shoes when we get into our house.”可知，她们可以在家不穿鞋子走动。文中提到没有沙发、不听大声音乐、保持安静。因此答案为A。

questions.prompt: When can't Helen and Lisa set alarm clocks?
questions.translation: 海伦和莉萨什么时候不能设闹钟？
questions.explanation: 根据家规“No alarm clocks for Sundays.”可知，星期天不准设闹钟。因此答案为D。

sections.title: 一、阅读理解 C
sections.instruction: 阅读下面语言材料，从每题所给的 A、B、C、D 四个选项中选出最佳选项。
sections.passage:
My friend John has a restaurant in a big city. It is near a supermarket. He has ten robots for the restaurant. Each robot is 20,000 yuan. The restaurant is not big, but very popular. Now more and more people come for dinner.

The robots have different jobs in the restaurant. Two robots cook different kinds of food; one does the dishes; one cleans the floor and the others give food to the customers.

Although robots do most of the jobs in the restaurant, John is still very busy. He must do many things to keep the robots working well. Luckily, John is good at studying robots and he knows robots very well. I think there will be a lot of robot-themed restaurants around the world in the future.

questions.prompt: How many robots give food to the customers in John's restaurant?
questions.translation: 在约翰的餐馆里，有多少个机器人负责给顾客送餐？
questions.explanation: 根据第二段“He has ten robots... Two robots cook... one does the dishes; one cleans the floor and the others give food to the customers.”可知，一共有10台机器人，2台做饭、1台洗碗、1台扫地，其余的送餐，数量为：10 - 2 - 1 - 1 = 6台。因此答案为D。

questions.translation: 约翰擅长什么？
questions.explanation: 根据最后一段“Luckily, John is good at studying robots and he knows robots very well.”可知，约翰擅长研究机器人。因此答案为B。

questions.prompt: What can we learn from the passage?
options: A. John's restaurant is in a small city.
B. The robots cost John 200,000 yuan.
C. John has much free time in the restaurant.
D. The robots do the same job in the restaurant.
questions.translation: 我们能从文章中学到什么？
questions.explanation: 根据第一段“He has ten robots... Each robot is 20,000 yuan.”可知，10台机器人总共花费约翰 10 * 20,000 = 200,000元。餐馆在大城市、约翰很忙、机器人分工不同。因此答案为B。

questions.prompt: What's the best title for the passage?
questions.translation: 文章的最佳标题是什么？
questions.explanation: 整篇文章都在围绕约翰的机器人餐馆的运作和未来设想展开，因此“John's robot restaurant”是最佳标题。答案为D。

sections.title: 一、阅读理解 D
sections.instruction: 阅读下面语言材料，从每题所给的 A、B、C、D 四个选项中选出最佳选项。
sections.passage:
Tom, Lily, Emma and Olivia are good friends. They love spending time together, but they also know how to respect each other's personal space.

Tom, the turtle, likes to have some quiet time in his room, reading his favorite books. His friends know when Tom needs this time and won't bother him.

Lily, the ladybug, loves playing together. But she also knows that sometimes her friends need their personal space. She always asks them first, "Would you like to play with me?" In this way, everyone feels comfortable saying yes or no.

Emma is a kind elephant. She likes sharing food with her friends, but she knows not everyone likes the food she shares. Emma usually asks politely, "Would you like some?"

Olivia is a smart owl. She loves listening to her friends' stories. She knows it's important to let her friends express themselves. She often waits for others to speak first.

questions.prompt: What does Tom like doing in his room?
questions.translation: 汤姆喜欢在房间里做什么？
questions.explanation: 根据第二段“Tom... likes to have some quiet time in his room, reading his favorite books.”可知，汤姆喜欢在房间里看书。因此答案为B。

questions.prompt: How do Lily's friends feel about her way of asking for a game?
questions.translation: 莉莉的朋友们对她邀请一起玩的方式有什么感觉？
questions.explanation: 根据第三段“In this way, everyone feels comfortable saying yes or no.”可知，大家觉得很舒服（comfortable）。因此答案为D。

questions.prompt: Which of the following can best describe Emma?
questions.translation: 下面哪项最能形容艾玛？
questions.explanation: 第四段提到“Emma is a kind elephant... sharing food... asks politely”，说明她既友好又礼貌（Friendly and polite）。因此答案为C。

questions.prompt: Who may be the last to speak when meeting up with friends?
questions.translation: 和朋友见面时，谁可能是最后一个说话的？
questions.explanation: 根据最后一段“Olivia is a smart owl... She often waits for others to speak first.”可知，奥利维亚经常等别人先说，所以她可能是最后一个说话的。因此答案为D。

questions.prompt: What can we learn from the passage?
options: A. Life is better with best friends.
B. True friends are always together.
C. Friends are important to everyone.
D. Friends should respect each others' personal space.
questions.translation: 我们能从文章中学到什么？
questions.explanation: 通读全文，四位好朋友虽然喜欢待在一起，但都知道尊重彼此的私人空间（respect each other's personal space），这是文章的主旨。因此答案为D。

sections.title: 二、任务型阅读
sections.instruction: 根据短文内容，从短文后的选项中选出能填入空白处的最佳选项。选项中有一项为多余选项。
sections.passage:
Thailand has a big problem. [1] These small things are called plankton (浮游生物). But when there is too much plankton, it hurts other animals in the sea. This brings trouble for fishermen who grow mussels (贻贝).

Usually, plankton is good for the ocean. [2] Plankton grows quickly for just one or two days. It takes oxygen (氧气) from the water and does not let enough sunlight in. It is harmful to other animals and plants in the sea. [3]

In Chonburi, many people grow mussels. Now more than 80% of fishermen are having problems. [4]

Scientists are not sure why this is happening. Some say it might be because the water is getting too warm and dirty. A scientist says, "Now too much plankton has become a common problem and the ocean is being harmed. [5]"
wordbank: Some of them may even die.
They are losing a lot of money.
Plankton plays an important role in the water.
There are too many small things in the water.
But this time, there is more plankton than usual.
We should find a way to solve it as soon as possible.

questions.answer: There are too many small things in the water.
questions.translation: 水里有太多的微小生物。
questions.explanation: 后一句提到“These small things are called plankton（这些微小的东西被称为浮游生物）”，说明空格处应提到“水里的微小生物/小东西”，对应选项D。

questions.answer: But this time, there is more plankton than usual.
questions.translation: 但是这一次，浮游生物比平时要多。
questions.explanation: 前句提到“Usually, plankton is good for the ocean.（通常浮游生物对海洋是有益的）”，后文转折说明这次浮游生物生长过快、有害，因此空格处应填入“但这一次浮游生物比平时多”，起到承上启下的转折作用，对应选项E。

questions.answer: Some of them may even die.
questions.translation: 它们中的一些甚至可能会死去。
questions.explanation: 前句提到“It is harmful to other animals and plants in the sea.（它对海里的其他动植物是有害的）”，空格处延续说明危害的结果，即“它们中的一些甚至可能会死掉”，对应选项A。

questions.answer: They are losing a lot of money.
questions.translation: 他们正在损失大量的金钱。
questions.explanation: 前句说春武里府很多渔民养殖贻贝，超过80%的渔民面临问题。养殖生物受损意味着经济损失，所以“他们正在损失许多钱”最符合逻辑，对应选项B。

questions.answer: We should find a way to solve it as soon as possible.
questions.translation: 我们应该尽快找到解决它的办法。
questions.explanation: 前面是科学家的引言，提到浮游生物过多已经成为普遍问题，海洋正在受损。作为引言的结尾，提出呼吁“我们应该尽快找到解决办法”最为恰当，对应选项F。
